Built a production RAG system with hybrid search — ONNX embeddings + BM25 + knowledge graph with temporal decay and PageRank scoring

Deployed a full-stack app solo in 3 days — Next.js + Supabase + dedicated server, complete with auth, real-time data, and CI/CD
Built automated scraping pipelines — Chrome extension DOM extraction, Playwright headless, data cleaning, and direct-to-database ingestion
Managing a production server: Hetzner ARM64, Ubuntu, nginx, systemd, PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector, Let's Encrypt, auto-deploy pipeline from git push
Built document processing pipelines: PDF generation with Jinja2 templates, python-docx, OCR extraction, structured data output
Native Claude API expert — custom client library with token management, streaming, structured JSON output, multi-model routing (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku)
Built mybuilding.dev — a full CRM for freelancers with AI job scoring, cover letter generation, pipeline management, calendar, and Chrome extension

Built conversational AI systems with context management, multi-command routing, conversation buffers, and automated response generation
